assessment: All core CAD processing libraries already available in existing Python installations. No new installs required for PHASE 0-5 MVP.

ezdxf.role: PRIMARY — DXF read/write, entity iteration, hatch generation, drawing render
key_modules: ezdxf.entities (LWPOLYLINE, LINE, HATCH, TEXT, MTEXT, INSERT)

shapely.role: Polygon operations, region closure, spatial predicates (contains, intersects, buffer)

scipy.role: Spatial KD-tree for nearest-neighbour endpoint snapping

rtree.role: Spatial index for large drawings (fast bbox queries)

trimesh.role: 3D mesh, possible future use for site model

matplotlib.role: DXF rendering to PNG via ezdxf MatplotlibBackend

PyYAML.role: Layer alias config, export schema YAML

click.fallback: argparse (stdlib) — works in py312 without click install

for_py312: click (8.x) — only if using py312 for CLI
for_py310: rtree — only needed for large drawing spatial index (>50k entities)
missing_packages.overall: None blocking for MVP. All core geometry/topology libraries present.

install_suggestions_if_needed.note: Do NOT install yet. Use py310 first — it has both click AND all geo libs.
